verifying.title: Verifying Payment...
verifying.description: Please wait while we confirm your payment

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.description: Thank you for your purchase, subscription activated

pending.title: Payment Processing
pending.description: Your payment is being processed, subscription will be activated soon

failed.title: Payment Verification Failed
failed.description: Sorry, we could not verify your payment
failed.notice: If you have completed the payment, please refresh the page later to check the status, or contact customer service for help.

cancel.title: Payment Cancelled
cancel.description: Your payment has been cancelled. No charges were made.
cancel.notice: If you encountered any issues during the payment process, please try again or contact our support team.
